usage: Import { motion } from 'framer-motion'. Apply variants to <motion.div> or <motion.button>.

fadeInUp.code: const fadeInUp = { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { duration: 0.5, ease: [0.23, 1, 0.32, 1] } }, exit: { opacity: 0, y: -20, transition: { duration: 0.3 } } };

staggerContainer.code: const staggerContainer = { initial: { opacity: 0 }, animate: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1, delayChildren: 0.1 } } };

staggerItem.code: const staggerItem = { initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, animate: { opacity: 1, y: 0, transition: { duration: 0.4, ease: "easeOut" } } };

springHover.code: const springHover = { hover: { scale: 1.02, y: -4, transition: { type: "spring", stiffness: 400, damping: 25 } }, tap: { scale: 0.98 } };

scaleIn.code: const scaleIn = { initial: { opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }, animate: { opacity: 1, scale: 1, transition: { type: "spring", stiffness: 300, damping: 30 } }, exit: { opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, transition: { duration: 0.2 } } };
